columns.extraction_plan: In Table A1 (Figure A1) on page 16, locate the "Overall" row under the "Subgroup" column. In the "Darolutamide + ADT + Docetaxel Median" column, the value is "NE".
In Table A1 (Figure A1) on page 16, locate the "Overall" row under the "Subgroup" column. In the "Placebo + ADT + Docetaxel Median" column, the value is "42.4".
In Figure 2, Panel A (page 6), which shows OS for high-volume disease, locate the "Darolutamide + ADT + docetaxel Median" line. The value is "NE".
In Figure 2, Panel A (page 6), which shows OS for high-volume disease, locate the "Placebo + ADT + docetaxel Median" line. The value is "42.4 months".
In Figure 2, Panel B (page 6), which shows OS for low-volume disease, locate the "Darolutamide + ADT + docetaxel Median" line. The value is "NE".
In Figure 2, Panel B (page 6), which shows OS for low-volume disease, locate the "Placebo + ADT + docetaxel Median" line. The value is "NE".
